events.text: Goal!  Korea Republic 0, Portugal 1. Ricardo Horta (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Diogo Dalot.
Goal!  Korea Republic 1, Portugal 1. Kim Young-Gwon (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal    following a corner.
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Korea Republic 2, Portugal 1. Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Son Heung-Min with a through ball   following a fast break.
Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
